based on Marvel Comics and as lore accurate as I could make it..while being a bit lazy lols. you're basically taking Sue's place here.

honey's notes

MY MAN IS GOING TO BE IN MARVEL RIVALS SOON. I NEED HIM SO BAD. ngl got lazy with the pretty bios. saving those bad boys for my baby ben. xoxo

i guess this could be possible angst..? if you make it that way. or it could be fluff. or smut. so i'm going to tag it as all three. LOL

please note! if you're using the BETA LLM, many issues you could be having could be a result of the API and not my bots! for more information, check out the site's discord xoxo
